KoreanFieldwork-recordCreationTiming.description: Korean field notebook timing states for distinguishing observations that must be captured in the field from later derived records

KoreanFieldwork-verificationState.description: Korean field notebook verification states for keeping interpretation separate from observation

KoreanFieldwork-fieldRecordQuality.description: Korean field notebook record-quality checks for accuracy, immediacy, reproducibility, and separation of observation from interpretation

KoreanFieldwork-fieldOnlyMissingCheck.description: Korean field-only missing checks for stratigraphic boundaries, feature outlines, pre-removal states, photo angles, spatial/elevation/orientation data, and sample points that cannot be recovered after fieldwork

KoreanFieldwork-artifactHandlingWorkflow.description: Korean artifact lifecycle checks for tracking finds from field collection through emergency treatment, conservation, reports, selection, state vesting, packing, transport, and transfer

KoreanFieldwork-artifactQuantityBasis.description: Korean artifact quantity basis checks for keeping administrative lots, physical item counts, same-object joins, components, actual counts, conservation units, and evidence photos separate

KoreanFieldwork-storageEnvironmentContro.description: Korean storage environment checks for treating training standards as reference values and tracking current-standard review, measured conditions, material ranges, deviations, and inspection

KoreanFieldwork-firstExposureRecord.description: Korean field notebook checks for recording feature outlines, shoulder lines, overlap, section checks, and drying risks at the first exposure moment

KoreanFieldwork-pitDwellingExposureBaulk.description: Korean pit dwelling checks for first exposure, shoulder lines, baulk setup, section photos, protection, and justified exploratory trenches

KoreanFieldwork-pitDwellingFloorFacility.description: Korean pit dwelling checks for floor surfaces, wall-floor junctions, postholes, hearths, stoves, wall grooves, storage pits, drains, entrances, and facility sections

KoreanFieldwork-pitDwellingFireEvidence.description: Korean burned pit dwelling checks for treating charcoal, burnt soil, ash, heat alteration, timber directions, staged plans, and sample points as evidence rather than assumed fire causes

KoreanFieldwork-pitDwellingOverlapSequen.description: Korean overlapping pit dwelling checks for staged plan stripping, section evidence, over-trenching risk, later/earlier excavation order, and unresolved sequence decisions

KoreanFieldwork-ironProcessEvidence.description: Korean iron-production checks for keeping smelting, smithing, casting, steelmaking, mixed-process, and analysis-confirmed interpretations separate

KoreanFieldwork-ironFurnaceStructure.description: Korean iron-furnace structural checks for recording plans, sections, walls, floors, tuyere evidence, tapping openings, storage, waste deposits, workshops, and ritual candidates

KoreanFieldwork-ironResidueSubtype.description: Korean iron residue subtypes for separating ore, charcoal, furnace wall, tuyeres, tap slag, furnace-internal slag, blooms, reduced lumps, smithing debris, additives, molds, and crucible candidates

KoreanFieldwork-ironSampleAnalysisPlan.description: Korean iron-sample analysis planning checks for linking field observation, sampling position, destructive preparation, analysis methods, oxide interpretation, dating, wood species, and feedback

KoreanFieldwork-tombMoundInvestigation.description: Korean tomb mound checks for pre-excavation survey, contour and disturbance mapping, baulk placement, mound or sealing deposits, construction units, stone settings, ditches, recuts, and preserved areas

KoreanFieldwork-tombBurialStructureInves.description: Korean tomb burial-structure checks for separating observed burial facilities from interpretation, and for recording capstones, seals, fills, small finds, wall elevations, floors, closures, entrances, additional burials, disturbance, dismantling, and preservation decisions

KoreanFieldwork-graveGoodsRitualContext.description: Korean grave-goods and ritual context checks for recording wearing position, coffin/chamber/ditch/entrance contexts, closure deposits, ritual vessels, breakage, animal and food offerings, foreign-element candidates, function uncertainty, collection units, and relation to human remains

KoreanFieldwork-humanRemainsRecoveryAnal.description: Korean human-remains recovery checks for specialist consultation, exposure order, contamination control, soft tools, shade, restricted water use, 1:5 drawing, relation to grave goods, packaging, conservation, drying, individual identification, and analysis criteria

KoreanFieldwork-personalNotebookArchive.description: Korean field notebook archive states for treating personal notes as submitted, reviewed, and accessible official records

KoreanFieldwork-dailyLogContent.description: Korean daily fieldwork log content for work progress, weather, staff, equipment, finds, visitors, and change reasons that must remain traceable to reports

KoreanFieldwork-dailyLogEvidenceRole.description: Korean daily log evidence roles for marking same-day fact records, cumulative staffing and equipment counts, weather, meetings, and dispute-relevant documentation

KoreanFieldwork-dailyLogReview.description: Korean daily log review states for same-day writing, author and reviewer checks, source preservation, and cross-checks with photos, drawings, finds, samples, and number conversions

KoreanFieldwork-digitalSourcePreservatio.description: Korean field notebook source-preservation states for original drawings, photos, electronic notebooks, backups, and access procedures

KoreanFieldwork-investigationAdministrat.description: Korean field notebook checklist for tracking investigation administration from request and permit to completion reporting and final report submission

KoreanFieldwork-permitConditionComplianc.description: Korean field notebook checklist for keeping permit documents, permit conditions, period checks, changes, and inspections visible in field records

KoreanFieldwork-preservationActionTracki.description: Korean field notebook checklist for following preservation actions through notice, implementation, management, inspection, and reevaluation

KoreanFieldwork-investigationRecordHando.description: Korean field notebook checklist for tracking records, finds, summary reports, successor institutions, and source links across investigation stage handovers

KoreanFieldwork-termRelation.description: Korean archaeological term authority relationships for aliases, specialist terms, and report labels

doNotMergeToSingleTerm.label: Do not merge to single term

KoreanFieldwork-termSearchMapping.description: Korean archaeological term search mappings that connect field search terms, preferred headwords, original scripts, and report output terms without collapsing them into one stored value

KoreanFieldwork-termAuthorityStatus.description: Korean archaeological term authority status for tracking dictionary source quality, original-script checks, OCR risk, and readiness for UI value lists

KoreanFieldwork-termDictionaryDomain.description: Korean archaeological dictionary domains for deciding which specialist authority a term belongs to

KoreanFieldwork-termApplicationScope.description: Korean archaeological term application scopes for screen labels, value lists, help, report output, search aliases, and import mappings

KoreanFieldwork-termSourcePriority.description: Korean archaeological term source priorities for specialist dictionaries, general dictionaries, methodology materials, reports, and field usage

KoreanFieldwork-featurePackage.description: Korean field notebook package types derived from the supplementary methodology and dictionary readings

KoreanFieldwork-surfaceSurveyObservation.description: Korean field notebook surface survey observations for terrain, location potential, landform modification, cut sections, artifact-bearing layers, and redeposition risk

KoreanFieldwork-surfaceSurveyBiasControl.description: Korean field notebook controls for reducing surface survey observation bias by separating prior sources, walkover observations, route visibility, cross-checking, and later literature comparison

KoreanFieldwork-surfaceSurveyFollowUp.description: Korean field notebook follow-up decisions for treating surface survey results as evidence for preservation, sample survey, test excavation, full excavation, stratigraphy survey, watching brief, or chance find reporting

KoreanFieldwork-gisPredictionEvidence.description: Korean fieldwork GIS and aerial-photo prediction evidence for recording terrain, watercourse, soil, geology, aerial-photo, map, borehole, and analytical inputs behind site-potential models

KoreanFieldwork-gisPredictionFieldVerifi.description: Korean fieldwork checks for comparing GIS predictions with field observations, including confirmation, non-confirmation, missed candidates, over-prediction, trial trench recommendations, and survey route changes

KoreanFieldwork-samplePurpose.description: Korean field notebook sample purposes for linking collection to analytical questions

KoreanFieldwork-sampleCollectionHandling.description: Korean field notebook handling controls for samples whose analytical value depends on light, moisture, contamination, and mapped collection context

KoreanFieldwork-fortificationGateFacilit.description: Gate and defensive component list derived from the 2007 castle terminology source check and fortress dictionary reading

KoreanFieldwork-fortificationHiddenGateF.description: Hidden-gate function list for recording concealment, supply transport, rescue, counterattack, and structural clues checked against the 2007 castle terminology source

KoreanFieldwork-fortificationParapetDeta.description: Parapet detail list for recording crenels, gun openings, capstones, materials, form, and defender assignment instead of only presence or absence

KoreanFieldwork-fortificationWaterFacili.description: Water gate and drain list for recording scale, form, stream relation, and repair history

KoreanFieldwork-japaneseFortificationDit.description: Japanese-style fortress ditch list separating water state, orientation, section, and function from Joseon town-wall ditch terms

KoreanFieldwork-reportCrossCheck.description: Korean report cross-check items for generating and auditing report outputs from field records

KoreanFieldwork-reportEvaluationFeedback.description: Korean report evaluation feedback items for linking evaluation results back to source records and future field improvements

KoreanFieldwork-reviewedRecordUnit.description: Korean field record quality review list for identifying which source record units were reviewed

KoreanFieldwork-qualityReviewStage.description: Korean field record quality review stages from same-day review through report evaluation feedback

KoreanFieldwork-qualityCorrectionBasis.description: Korean field record quality correction basis list for preserving review reasons and source-record traceability

KoreanFieldwork-typologyArgument.description: Korean fieldwork typology argument list for recording representative attributes, variation, related artifact groups, and alternative classifications before fixing a type name

KoreanFieldwork-chronologyArgument.description: Korean fieldwork chronology argument list for keeping period decisions tied to stratigraphy, associated finds, absolute dates, marker artifacts, and alternative chronologies

KoreanFieldwork-assemblageRelation.description: Korean fieldwork assemblage relation list for separating same-layer or closed assemblages from accidental association, redeposition, mixed contexts, and unclear contemporaneity

KoreanFieldwork-mediaEvidenceRole.description: Korean fieldwork media evidence roles for identifying which field judgment, report plate, preservation action, or public output a photo or drawing supports

KoreanFieldwork-mediaQualityCheck.description: Korean fieldwork media quality checks for direction, scale, control points, resolution or linework, lighting, source preservation, and register-number consistency
